[DQC.US.0195.10627] us-gaap:StockRepurchasedDuringPeriodValue has a value of 905,988,000 and has been used with a retained earnings member. This element should not have a value when used with a retained earnings member. The preparer should consider if the value is input correctly or if a different element or member should be used. If the company has no treasury stock then the element StockRepurchasedDuringPeriodValue should not be used as the stock would be retired and the value should be reported using StockRepurchasedAndRetiredDuringPeriodValue.
This rule will not report an error if the Retained Earnings value is less than 10% of the total impacting shareholders equity. The total compared to determine materiality is 10% of 949,996,000 or 94,999,600. The properties of this us-gaap:StockRepurchasedDuringPeriodValue fact are: Period :2022-01-30 to 2023-01-28 Dimensions : us-gaap:StatementEquityComponentsAxis=us-gaap:RetainedEarningsMember Unit : USD Rule Element Id:10627 Rule version: 29.0.2 - ROST_instance_2024_2025.xml 1707
